---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Elmoorx
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 What problem does this solve?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 🚀 Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternatives considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📦 Affected packages

Which Elmoorx packages would this affect? (Check all that apply)

- [ ] `@elmoorx/runtime`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/router`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/server`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/compiler`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/cli`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/ui`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/auth`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/postgres`
- [ ] `@elmoorx/i18n`
- [ ] Other: ___

## 📝 API sketch

If this is a new API, please sketch the proposed interface:

```tsx
import { $state, h } from "@elmoorx/runtime";

// Show how the new API would be used
const newThing = proposedAPI(options);
```

## 🎯 Use cases

Describe 2-3 concrete use cases where this feature would help.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## 🏷️ Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

- Have you seen similar features in other frameworks? (React, Vue, Solid, Svelte, etc.)
- Would you be willing to submit a PR for this?
